title: push_subscription_set sends push capability when chat_push is None
description: When input.chat_push is None, push_subscription_set still includes urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat:push in the using array. RFC 8620 §3.3 says clients MUST only list capabilities they are using. A conformant server MAY return unknownCapability if the capability URI is unknown to it (or simply reject the request). Fix: only include the push capability URI when input.chat_push.is_some().
